info.english_meaning: to kill to die to leave body
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' mIYo mInAti mInIte hiMsAyAM mIyate NitaH ' (Slo. 16) iti devaH  ' hiMsAtra mftiH ' iti DA.kA.vyA vyAKyAyAm (2.58)

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tvAM mftyurdayatAM mA pramezWAH' (aTarva॰8.1.5) mA pramezWAH=mA mfTAH prapUrva eva sIN mftyumAcazwe na kevalaH yaTA pramAyuko BavatItyatra na tasya lomA'pi mIyata ityatra mIyate kzIyate Cidyata ityarTasya darSanAt
'aTa tadBItayA rAjYyA rakke pramayamAgate' (rAjata॰6.284) pramayo mftyuH
'na cAkAle pramIyate' (sOndara0 115) na pramIyate na prARErviyujyate na mriyate
